aboutTeaser.title: Reliable supplies for industrial operations
aboutTeaser.description: SUINTEC supports contractors, engineers, and companies with technology solutions for pumping systems, electrical automation, and industrial equipment.
aboutTeaser.point1: Equipment selection based on technical project requirements
aboutTeaser.point2: Supply for construction, maintenance, and continuous operation
aboutTeaser.point3: Specialized commercial support for industrial clients

servicesBlock.title: Our categories
servicesBlock.description: Equipment and supplies selected for industrial, commercial, and construction applications.

servicesBlock2.title: Solutions for industrial systems
servicesBlock2.description: We combine technical supply and application criteria so each component fits the working environment.
servicesBlock2.intro: We work with companies that need operational continuity, efficiency, and support in equipment selection.

whyChooseUs.title: Technical support for your operation
whyChooseUs.description: We combine product quality, technical support, and service oriented to real industrial projects.

ctaStrip.title: Need a quote for your project?
ctaStrip.description: Tell us which equipment or system you need and our sales team will help you define the best option.

process.title: How we work
process.description: A clear end-to-end process so you get the right solution.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: Tell us your requirement: flow, pressure, and operating conditions.

step2.title: Technical selection
step2.description: We define the right equipment for your application and working environment.

step3.title: Supply
step3.description: We deliver the equipment backed by leading brands and warranty.

step4.title: After-sales
step4.description: Follow-up, spare parts, and ongoing technical support.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Companies and engineers that trust SUINTEC for their operations.

agro.text: SUINTEC's team helped us select the right pumps for our wells and irrigation system, with clear technical advice and on-time delivery.

construction.text: We solved the pressure and hydropneumatic systems and the fire-fighting pumps for our projects with reliable equipment and support that met both the standard and the deadlines.

industrial.text: We value SUINTEC's equipment availability and the speed of their quotes; their technical backing lets us meet our own commitments without setbacks.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.description: We serve projects in Lima and coordinate nationwide delivery.

advice.title: On-site and remote advice
advice.description: We support you in selecting the equipment, wherever you are.

delivery.title: Delivery coordination to site
delivery.description: We manage the dispatch of your equipment to wherever you need it.

b2b.title: B2B commercial service
b2b.description: Direct dealing with contractors, engineers, and purchasing teams.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: We answer the most common questions before your quote.

q1.question: Do you deliver outside Lima?
q1.answer: Yes. We serve Lima and coordinate shipping to other regions depending on the equipment and project.

q2.question: Do you issue invoices?
q2.answer: Yes, we are a registered company and issue electronic invoices for all our sales.

q3.question: Do you help me choose the right equipment?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We size the equipment based on flow, pressure, load, and your project's application.

q4.question: Do the products come with a warranty?
q4.answer: Yes. We work with leading brands that include a manufacturer warranty and technical support.

q5.question: How do I request a quote?
q5.answer: Message us on WhatsApp, fill out the contact form, or email us at ventas@suintecperu.com; we'll get back to you shortly.

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: We support different sectors with pumping and equipment solutions adapted to the demands of each operation.

agriculture.title: Agriculture
agriculture.description: Comprehensive solutions for the agro-industrial sector: fertigation and fertilizer dosing, water transfer and extraction from deep wells, reservoir cleaning, and chemical dosing pumps, focused on efficiency and durability.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: Safe and operational job sites with constant-pressure and hydropneumatic systems, wastewater and septic management, and fire-fighting pumps compliant with the NFPA standard.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Robust solutions for production and manufacturing processes, fluid handling in the chemical and petrochemical industries, and applications for the food, beverage, and pharmaceutical sectors, with precise flow control and operational safety.

sanitation.title: Sanitation
sanitation.description: Management, transfer, and treatment of wastewater in municipal and industrial plants, with dosing pumps for chemical treatment, contributing to environmental care and public health.

solutions.title: Solutions for industrial systems
solutions.description: We combine technical supply and application criteria so each component fits the working environment. We work with companies that need operational continuity, efficiency, and support in equipment selection.
solutions.quoteMessagePrefix: Hello, I'd like a quote for:

pumps.title: Pumps
pumps.description: A selection of pumps for extraction, constant pressure, transfer, and wastewater handling, according to each project's requirements.

monobloque.title: Monobloc
monobloque.description: Monobloc centrifugal pump in cast iron or stainless steel; high flow for clean or slightly aggressive water; transfer, irrigation, fire-fighting, and processes.

deepWell.title: Deep-well submersible
deepWell.description: Water extraction from deep wells and boreholes. Includes stainless steel submersible pumps and motors for irrigation and supply from groundwater.

verticalMultistage.title: Vertical multistage
verticalMultistage.description: High pressure in a compact footprint; constant pressure, hydropneumatic systems, and building water supply.

horizontalMultistage.title: Horizontal multistage
horizontalMultistage.description: Pressurization and pressure transfer; washing systems and constant pressure in a horizontal configuration.

freeShaft.title: Bare-shaft pump on baseplate
freeShaft.description: The most robust option: a bare-shaft pump coupled to a motor on a baseplate, for high flow rates and continuous duty in industry, sanitation, and large-scale transfer.

bellSubmersible.title: Bell-type submersible
bellSubmersible.description: For wastewater and sludge with suspended solids, in cast iron or stainless steel; anti-clogging design for municipal and industrial sanitation.

motors.title: Motors and blowers
motors.description: Electric motors, power transmission, and air blowing to drive and move your industrial processes.

electric.title: Electric motors
electric.description: Three-phase and single-phase motors for machinery and industrial processes; high efficiency (IE2/IE3), in cast iron or aluminum, for continuous duty.

gearmotors.title: Gearmotors and reducers
gearmotors.description: Motor + reducer sets, and standalone reducers, to reduce speed and multiply torque in conveyor belts, mixers, and process machinery.

blowers.title: Blowers
blowers.description: Air injection for wastewater aeration, pneumatic transport, drying, and material mixing.

panels.title: Electrical panels
panels.description: Power, control, and distribution panels designed to keep your operation protected and running without interruptions. We size each panel with technical criteria, build it with leading-brand components, and test it in the workshop, ensuring safety, operational continuity, and energy efficiency.

points.point1: Power, control, distribution, transfer, and motor-starting panels.
points.point2: Leading-brand components for protection, switching, control, and metering.
points.point3: Technical sizing and workshop testing for maximum safety and continuity.

accessories.title: Industrial accessories
accessories.description: We complete every system with the accessories needed for a full, functional installation. We supply components for pumping lines, hydraulic networks, automation, and process control.

points.point1: Pipes, fittings, and accessories in PVC, iron, and stainless steel.
points.point2: Gate, check, butterfly, and regulating valves.
points.point3: Level, pressure, flow, and temperature sensors.
points.point4: Instrumentation and measuring devices for process monitoring.
points.point5: Electrical cables, trays, cable glands, and panel accessories.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To fully resolve our clients' equipment needs: helping them choose the right equipment, supplying it with quality, and backing them with close after-sales service that brings real value to every project.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become a benchmark in industrial supply in Peru, recognized for our closeness to clients, the innovation in each proposal, and the capacity to sustain efficient and lasting operations.

contactBlock.title: Contact us
contactBlock.description: Request a quote or technical advice for pumps, motors, panels, and industrial accessories.
contactBlock.okShort: Message sent — we'll contact you soon

footer.title: SUINTEC
footer.description: Industrial technology supplies for pumping, power, electrical control, and accessories.

pumpingSystems.description: Equipment for water movement, pressure, and supply in industrial operations.
pumpingSystems.point1: Pumps for industrial and commercial applications
pumpingSystems.point2: Options for flow, pressure, and operational continuity
pumpingSystems.point3: Support in selection by working conditions

motorDrive.title: Power and motion
motorDrive.description: Motors and components for processes that need stable performance and efficiency.

electricalIntegration.title: Electrical control
electricalIntegration.description: Panels and control solutions to protect, operate, and organize industrial systems.

technicalSupply.title: Technical supply
technicalSupply.description: Accessories, connections, and related equipment to complete industrial installations.
technicalSupply.point2: Supply for construction, maintenance, and operation

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Supplies selected to respond to industrial conditions and demanding projects.

technicalSupport.title: Technical support
technicalSupport.description: Guidance to choose equipment matched to flow, power, load, and operating environment.

reliableSolutions.title: Reliable solutions
reliableSolutions.description: Practical proposals for operational continuity, maintenance, and new installations.

specializedAttention.title: Dedicated support
specializedAttention.description: Direct communication with contractors, engineers, purchasing teams, and industrial companies.

pumps.title: Pumps
pumps.description: Water pumps for industrial, commercial, and pressure system applications.

motors.title: Motors
motors.description: Electric motors and power solutions for industrial equipment and processes.

panels.title: Panels
panels.description: Electrical control, protection, and command panels for industrial installations.

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.description: Accessories, connections, and complementary components for industrial systems.

contractor.name: Industrial contractor
contractor.text: The technical attention helped us define pumps and accessories for the jobsite without losing time on incomplete specifications.

engineering.name: Engineering team
engineering.text: We value having clear alternatives for motors, panels, and components compatible with our installations.

maintenance.name: Maintenance lead
maintenance.text: SUINTEC helps us solve replacement and operation requirements with direct, reliable communication.
